calendar/Day.name: Day
calendar/Day.description: Enumeration defining days of the week as integer constants. The members of this enumeration are exported to the module scope as MONDAY through SUNDAY. Added in version 3.12.

info.excerpt: Enumeration defining days of the week as integer constants. The members of this enumeration are exported to the module scope as MONDAY through SUNDAY. Added in version 3.12.

calendar/day_abbr.name: day_abbr
calendar/day_abbr.description: A sequence that represents the abbreviated days of the week in the current locale, where Mon is day number 0. >>> import calendar >>> list(calendar.day_abbr) ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat', 'Sun']

info.excerpt: A sequence that represents the abbreviated days of the week in the current locale, where Mon is day number 0. >>> import calendar >>> list(calendar.day_abbr) ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat',...

calendar/day_name.name: day_name
calendar/day_name.description: A sequence that represents the days of the week in the current locale, where Monday is day number 0. >>> import calendar >>> list(calendar.day_name) ['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday', 'Saturday', 'Sunday']
